title: SambaNetFS Share Configuration
description: A single SMB/Samba share configuration for the mount-samba CLI.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor validation.

name.description: Friendly display name shown by mount-samba.

host.description: SMB server host name or IP address.

path.description: Optional subdirectory inside the share. Do not include a leading slash.

pollIntervalSeconds.description: Per-share polling interval used by run and start commands.

mountPoint.description: Local POSIX directory used as the mount point.

account.description: Optional Keychain account name. Omit for guest or anonymous SMB behavior.
